products.title: Rebloom Black Hoodie
products.body_html:
100% fleece and french terry hoodie

Weight - 400 gsm

Built for statement and comfort, this premium hoodie features bold all-over screen print graphics that hit from every angle. Crafted from heavyweight 400 GSM fleece with soft French terry cotton, it delivers a perfect balance of structure, warmth, and everyday wearability. Designed with a clean front and a relaxed fit, this piece stands out without trying too hard—made for those who move different.
